nasb.text: a beka a head (that is, half a shekel according to the shekel of the sanctuary), for each one who passed over to those who were numbered, from twenty years old and upward, for 603,550 men.

esv.text: a beka a head (that is, half a shekel, by the shekel of the sanctuary), for everyone who was listed in the records, from twenty years old and upward, for 603,550 men.

cnv.text: 凡是按著次序被數點的人，從二十歲以上的，有六十萬三千五百五十人，按著聖所的標準，每人納銀六克。

ccb.text: 这是所有登记的、年龄在二十岁以上的人所缴纳的银子，共有六十万三千五百五十人，每人交六克银子，以圣所的秤为准。
